cases.prompt: gcloud Vertex AI 인증이 자꾸 안 돼, 고쳐줘

assertions.text: Diagnoses auth/ADC status and detects ghost-project issues.
Injects GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS env vars.
Offers a browser OAuth one-liner when re-auth is needed.

cases.prompt: Set up ADC so my BigQuery client can authenticate

assertions.text: Confirms the required project/credential env vars.
